title: pteris occidentalis
intro: Pteris occidentalis, also known as western bracken fern, is a species of fern that is native to the western parts of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pteris occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Pteris occidentalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
